abstract.text: This protocol is implemented by locale-specific services.
This view can be used when listing a locale.
This protocol can be implemented by any type that can be
used to get certain locale-specific information.
A locale-specific keyboard layout service.
This locale-based dictionary can store item types to
let you resolve them based on locale.
Whether the locale matches a certain locale.

The raw locale that is used by the keyboard locale.
KeyboardKit helps you create custom keyboard extensions with Swift and SwiftUI.
The raw locale name, as defined within the library.

This enum defines keyboard-specific, localized texts.

a reorderable list.
This enum defines KeyboardKit-supported locales and is a
namespace for locale-elated types.
Whether the locale language matches a certain locale.
The corresponding flag emoji for the locale.
Try to get a matching keyboard locale for a locale.

used as a license-based feature.
